commands.review_summary:
The PR updates createRuntimeLogging to forward non-empty RuntimeLogger metadata to tslog as the structured first argument and adds focused Vitest coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: RuntimeLogger accepts an optional meta object, while current main's createRuntimeLogging wrappers ignore the second argument and call logger methods with only the message. I did not run a write-producing local test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Keep this in human review until the external contributor adds real behavior proof; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair task because the patch itself is functionally correct.

target.title: fix: pass meta argument through RuntimeLogger methods in createRuntimeLogging
target.author: hddevteam
